title: Welcome To My Blog

title: About
text: Hello My Name is Ravi Mandliya. I am a curious learner. My interests include Recommendation Systems, Machine Learning and Deep Learning. I love diving deep into these fields and finding practical ways to apply their principles in real-world scenarios.
